entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's knowledge management and command system for organizing prompts, commands, and AI context

entities.name: Incantum
entities.context: Natural language trigger system enabling conversational invocation of N5 commands

entities.name: Recipes
entities.context: Index/registry for commands stored in recipes.jsonl with version, summary, and tags

entities.name: import-prompt
entities.context: Python script (n5_import_prompt.py) for importing prompts into N5 command format

entities.name: Knowledge
entities.context: Directory for storing companion files that provide context for AI

relationships.context: N5 uses Incantum triggers for natural language command invocation
N5 registers commands in Recipes index for discoverability
import-prompt is a script within the N5 system for batch/single prompt conversion
Both are subsystems of N5 for command management and invocation
